# @nifrajs/testing — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Testing helpers for nifra apps — a cookie jar + a cookie-persisting in-process test session on top of @nifrajs/client's testClient, so stateful auth/session flows test as easily as a single request.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **cookieJar** _(function)_ — `cookieJar: () => CookieJar`
- **testSession** _(function)_ — `testSession: <App extends AppLike>(app: App, options?: TestSessionOptions) => TestSession<App>`
- **AppLike** _(interface)_ — `interface AppLike`
- **CookieJar** _(interface)_ — `interface CookieJar`
- **TestSession** _(interface)_ — `interface TestSession<App>`
- **TestSessionOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface TestSessionOptions`

## Footguns

- No package-specific footguns beyond the framework conventions. See [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) and [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) for the full contract.
